section.period6m: Last 6 months · compared to the previous month
section.notEnoughData: Not enough data yet for analysis. Issue your first invoices and add expenses to see the smart insights.
section.notEnoughPeriod: Not enough information for this period yet. Issue invoices and enter expenses to see the analysis.

health.verdictExcellent: The company is in excellent financial health.
health.verdictGood: Stable condition with room for improvement.
health.verdictAttention: There are signals that require attention.
health.verdictCritical: Critical indicators — urgent action is needed.

forecast.pace: at the current pace · {pct}% of the month elapsed

insight.profitDecline3: Profit has been declining for the third month in a row.
insight.topClient: Your largest client “{name}” accounts for {pct}% of revenue.
insight.topClientPeriod: Client “{name}” accounts for {pct}% of turnover for the period.
insight.avgInvoiceUp: The average invoice value is rising (+{pct}%).
insight.newClientsDown: The number of new clients is decreasing.
insight.forecastRevenue: At the current pace the period ends with about {amount} in revenue.
insight.stable: Indicators are stable. No deviations that require attention.
insight.notEnoughCompare: Not enough information yet for a reliable comparison.
insight.expFasterRev: Expenses are growing faster than revenue.
insight.topClientRisk: Too much dependence on a single client.
insight.concentrationRisk: High concentration risk — one client is {pct}% of turnover.
insight.noRisks: No risks identified at the moment.

opp.avgInvoice10Year: If you raise the average invoice by 10%, annual revenue would grow by ~{amount}.
opp.avgInvoice10Period: If you raise the average invoice by 10%, revenue for the period would be ~{amount} more.
opp.bestMonth: The strongest month in the period is {label} — analyse what sets it apart.
opp.diversify: Growing your client base will reduce dependence and risk.
opp.collectUnpaid: {amount} awaits collection — faster collection improves cash flow.
opp.keepAdding: Keep entering data for more accurate recommendations.

topcl.empty: No client revenue for this period.
